name: Suncorp Group Limited
analysis: SUN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$18.4900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$18.6700, stop A$16.8696, target A$24.0712 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
